title: InfoGenius — Standalone Visual Knowledge Engine
description: A standalone, keyless, browser-native tool that researches any topic and composes a cited infographic entirely in the browser. It replaces the Google Gemini / AI Studio dependency of the original prototype with the keyless Wikipedia REST + MediaWiki APIs for datamining and summarization, and a deterministic in-browser SVG renderer for the infographic. An optional bring-your-own-key path can call the Google Gemini image API at runtime, but no Google code or credentials are bundled. Deployable as a static GitHub Pages site with zero server-side components.
